summary: Creates and exports a DATABASE_URL-backed pg Pool for server-side CockroachDB access.
responsibilities: Read DATABASE_URL only from the server process environment.
Create one shared pg Pool instance per server runtime.
Export helpers for server-side callers to get the pool, run parameterized queries, and close the pool.
invariants: This module must not be imported by browser/client components or client-side utilities.
Database reads and writes that expose sensitive data must perform authorization in the server route that calls this module.
DATABASE_URL must not be exposed through NEXT_PUBLIC variables or client bundles.
